title: trophis racemosa subsp. meridionalis
intro: Trophis racemosa subsp. meridionalis, also known as the Panama tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Trophis racemosa subsp. meridionalis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
